checks.name: router_read_only_flag
checks.detail: Router payload must be explicitly read-only.

checks.name: external_sources_on_demand_only
checks.detail: External sources must be defined only as on-demand tools.

checks.name: no_rows_eligible_for_external_lookup_now
checks.detail: No row may authorize immediate external marketplace lookup.

checks.name: all_rows_block_forbidden_actions
checks.detail: Every row must explicitly block contact/purchase/write/full-sync actions.

checks.name: source_labels_include_truth_sources
checks.detail: Rows must label Shopify/Tiny source boundaries.

checks.name: size_normalization_required_for_external
checks.detail: Rows with StockX/GOAT future sources must require US Men vs US Women size normalization.

checks.name: decision_scoped_no_full_sync
checks.detail: External price results, if approved later, must persist only decision-scoped summaries, not full-sync tables.

checks.name: fila_a_pending_excluded
checks.detail: Fila A should explicitly exclude stand-by residuals from sourcing.

checks.name: quote_preview_has_records
checks.detail: Quote preview records must match summary top_items_validated.

checks.name: quote_qty_not_purchase_qty
checks.detail: Quote records must not imply purchase approval; optional rows may say cotar/monitorar only.

checks.name: supplier_fields_required_not_filled_as_truth
checks.detail: Supplier data must remain required/pending rather than invented.

checks.name: lead_time_gate_present
checks.detail: Each quote preview record must carry a lead-time or pronta-entrega/remessa gate.

checks.name: cost_caps_not_real_margin
checks.detail: Margins must be represented as cost ceilings, not actual margin claims.

checks.name: quote_guardrails_no_external_actions
checks.detail: Source guardrails must explicitly prohibit supplier contact, purchases, and Shopify/Tiny writes.

guardrails: No Droper/StockX/GOAT/KicksDev call executed by this guard.
No purchase, PO, reservation, or payment executed.
No price, stock, product, campaign, or customer change executed.
No full-sync external price table created.
Quote quantity remains reference quantity, not purchase quantity.
Actual per-item external search requires explicit Lucas/Júlio approval naming the family/SKU/scope.
next_gate: Choose one family/SKU for a separate on-demand external price search, or keep as internal decision queue. Any supplier contact/purchase remains separate approval.
